referenceVisualNotes.heroLayout: Centered editorial hero with soft pastel atmosphere, large portrait image, and floating reassurance badges.
referenceVisualNotes.heroTypography: High-contrast serif headline with generous line height and relaxed supporting copy.
referenceVisualNotes.statsBar: No rigid stats strip; trust points are presented as floating chips near the hero image.
referenceVisualNotes.servicesSection: Magazine-like blend of image and service cards that feels spacious rather than grid-heavy.
referenceVisualNotes.featureSection: Full-width blush/peach panel with two columns: doctor story on one side and supportive detail list on the other.
referenceVisualNotes.testimonials: Primary oversized quote with secondary supporting quotes on soft cards.
referenceVisualNotes.sectionRhythm: Warm off-white hero -> white service mosaic -> peach callout -> soft-blue testimonials -> white contact/footer.
referenceVisualNotes.whitespace: Airy spacing and breathing room around headings, cards, and transitions.
referenceVisualNotes.buttonStyle: Rounded-rectangle buttons with soft shadow and clear filled vs outline hierarchy.
referenceVisualNotes.colorApplication: Primary blue anchors navigation and CTAs while blush/peach supports emotional warmth in callouts and accents.
